_field_docs._schema_version: semver of state.json schema; bump major when adding/removing fields or changing enums
_field_docs.active_run_tag: string|null; current active run tag (e.g. 'v1.0.0-rc1', git short SHA, or manual tag); null when no run is in progress
_field_docs.active_run: bool; if false, disc-evidence-required hook does NOT gate Stop events even when assistant claims discoverability completion
_field_docs.gate_status: enum: PENDING | STALE | PASS | WARN | FAIL | BLOCKED. PENDING = run initialized but gate.check not yet run; STALE = mark-stale hook fired since last gate.check; PASS/WARN/FAIL/BLOCKED mirror last_gate_result
_field_docs.stale_reasons: array; APPEND-ONLY during a run; each entry is an object {reason: string, file_path: string (relative), marked_at: ISO 8601 UTC, marked_by: string (hook or agent name)}. Cleared on next successful gate.check.
_field_docs.last_gate_at: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp; when gate.check last ran successfully (PASS or WARN or FAIL — but NOT when it errored out)
_field_docs.last_gate_result: enum: PASS | WARN | FAIL | BLOCKED | null; mirror of last gate-result.yaml decision; null when no gate.check has been run yet
_field_docs.last_gate_evidence_hash: sha256 hex digest of the evidence/discoverability/<tag>/ directory contents (sorted file list + each file SHA256, then hashed); used by disc-mark-stale to detect evidence drift
_field_docs.config_path: string; relative path from project root to the active discoverability.config.yaml (default: 'discoverability.config.yaml'); orchestrator + SDK + hooks read from this path
_field_docs.config_hash: sha256 hex digest of the config file contents; any config change → mark stale → forces gate.check rerun
_field_docs.harness_version: semver string; the harness version this state.json was created with; used for forward-compat detection if state schema evolves
